about.p1: "If it works, don't touch it". That phrase ends when I arrive.
about.p2: I am a software developer prepared to master both sides of the coin: the entire frontend infrastructure and all the complex backend logic. My true passion is software architecture, clean code, and best practices.
about.p3: I don't settle for a system that just "works"; I demand it to be scalable, fast, and maintainable. I optimize everything from massive databases to flawless interfaces, transforming complex business problems into indestructible technological solutions.

job1.title: Fullstack Analyst and Developer
job1.description: I contribute to the evolution of a robust ERP for the logistics and transportation sector. I have implemented over 15 critical functionalities, optimized high-performance SQL queries to process more than 4 million records, and developed government integrations (SOAP/REST). Additionally, I designed fullstack operational dashboards and significantly reduced technical debt by resolving complex bugs in the MVC core.

rhsolutions.title: RH SOLUTION - HUMAN RESOURCES SOFTWARE
rhsolutions.description: Human resources management web system that centralizes employee information, document management with digital signature, leave and permission requests, generation of work certificates, and onboarding/resignation processes.

edu1.degree: Technology in Software Analysis and Development

edu2.degree: Java in 13 Days with Real World Applications

edu3.degree: JavaScript Mastery: From Beginner to Expert
